articles.title: CVE-2025-15514 | Ollama up to 0.13.5 /api/chat mtmd_helper_bitmap_init_from_buf null pointer dereference (EUVD-2026-2400)
articles.summary:
A vulnerability categorized as critical has been discovered in Ollama up to 0.13.5. Affected by this vulnerability is the function mtmd_helper_bitmap_init_from_buf of the file /api/chat. Executing a manipulation can lead to use of nullpointerexception catch to detect null pointer dereference.

This vulnerability is handled as CVE-2025-15514. The attack can be executed remotely. There is not any exploit available.

articles.title: CVE-2026-0880 | Mozilla Firefox up to 146 Graphics integer overflow (Nessus ID 284821 / WID-SEC-2026-0090)
articles.summary:
A vulnerability labeled as critical has been found in Mozilla Firefox up to 146. This vulnerability affects unknown code of the component Graphics. Such manipulation leads to integer overflow.

This vulnerability is traded as CVE-2026-0880. The attack may be launched remotely. There is no exploit available.

The affected component should be upgraded.

articles.title: CVE-2026-8944 | engagementanalytics Plugin for Google Analytics Plugin up to 1.1 on WordPress ga.php cross-site request forgery
articles.summary:
A vulnerability has been found in engagementanalytics Plugin for Google Analytics Plugin up to 1.1 on WordPress and classified as problematic. This affects an unknown part of the file ga.php. The manipulation leads to cross-site request forgery.

This vulnerability is listed as CVE-2026-8944. The attack may be initiated remotely. There is no available exploit.

articles.title: CVE-2025-68493 | Apache Struts up to 2.3.37/2.5.33/6.1.0 SAXParserFactory xml external entity reference (S2-069 / EUVD-2026-1898)
articles.summary:
A vulnerability identified as problematic has been detected in Apache Struts up to 2.3.37/2.5.33/6.1.0. This affects an unknown function of the component SAXParserFactory. This manipulation causes xml external entity reference.

This vulnerability is tracked as CVE-2025-68493. The attack is possible to be carried out remotely. No exploit exists.

You should upgrade the affected component.

articles.title: CVE-2026-0879 | Mozilla Firefox up to 146 Graphics sandbox (Nessus ID 284821 / WID-SEC-2026-0090)
articles.summary:
A vulnerability identified as critical has been detected in Mozilla Firefox up to 146. This affects an unknown part of the component Graphics. This manipulation causes sandbox issue.

This vulnerability appears as CVE-2026-0879. The attack may be initiated remotely. There is no available exploit.

You should upgrade the affected component.
